summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Díaz & Cía Abogados website completed. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, WhatsApp integration, contact form, and mobile responsiveness. Minor issue with Emergent script presence in HTML.

minor_issues.issue: Emergent script still present in HTML despite 'no Emergent branding' requirement
minor_issues.impact: Script not visible to users but may violate 'no Emergent branding' requirement

passed_tests: All 10 WhatsApp buttons function with correct number (+56935436770)
Floating WhatsApp button visible and functional
All required sections present (Hero, Especialidades, Por qué elegirnos, Equipo, Proceso, Testimonios, Métricas, FAQ, CTA, Contacto, Footer)
No visible Emergent branding in page content
Specialty cards link to WhatsApp correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider removing Emergent script from /app/frontend/public/index.html line 110 if strict 'no Emergent branding' requirement applies to hidden scripts
